name: Deconstruct AI Gemini Image Edit Orchestrator

assignments.name: n8nWorkflow
assignments.value: Deconstruct AI Gemini Image Edit Orchestrator

assignments.name: templateRuleQuality
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const body = $('Prepare Binary Inputs').first().json; const ruleText = ((body.templateRuleText || body.existingTemplateRules || '') + '').trim(); return { storageFormat: 'plain-multiline-text', characterCount: ruleText.length, lineCount: ruleText ? ruleText.split('\n').length : 0, richEnough: ruleText.length >= 1000 }; })() }}

assignments.name: gemini
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const body = $('Prepare Binary Inputs').first().json; const inputFields = ($('Prepare Binary Inputs').first().json.inputBinaryFields || []).filter(k => /^asset_\d+$/.test(k)); const data = $json.generatedImageData || null; const mimeType = (($binary.edited && $binary.edited.mimeType) || 'image/png'); return { attempted: true, ok: Boolean(data && mimeType && mimeType.startsWith('image/')), model: 'models/gemini-3.1-flash-image', outputImageSize: body.outputImageSize || '1536x1024', text: null, image: data ? { mimeType, data } : null, assetImageCount: inputFields.length, responseDiagnostics: { source: 'native-gemini-edit-image-node', nativeNodeBypassed: false, hasEditedBinary: Boolean($binary.edited), hasImageData: Boolean(data), inputBinaryFields: inputFields }, conditioning: { templateMode: 'reuse-existing-template', generationMode: body.generationMode || 'single', existingTemplateRulesUsed: Boolean((body.templateRuleText || body.existingTemplateRules || '').trim()), referenceImageCount: 0, assetImageCount: inputFields.length, usedNativeGeminiImageEditNode: true, directGeminiApi: false, assetRequiredInPrompt: true, inputBinaryFields: inputFields } }; })() }}

assignments.name: evidence
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const body = $('Prepare Binary Inputs').first().json; const inputFields = ($('Prepare Binary Inputs').first().json.inputBinaryFields || []).filter(k => /^asset_\d+$/.test(k)); return { n8n: true, flowise: false, flowiseBypassed: true, gemini: Boolean($json.generatedImageData), nativeGeminiNodes: true, nativeGeminiImageEditNode: true, directGeminiApi: false, codeNodesInPrimaryPath: 1, imageDataReturned: Boolean($json.generatedImageData), noFallbacks: true, inputBinaryFields: inputFields, assetImageCount: inputFields.length, outputImageSize: body.outputImageSize || '1536x1024', referenceImageCount: 0, templateMode: 'reuse-existing-template', generationMode: body.generationMode || 'single', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }; })() }}
